name: Chara smothers you
description:
You get smothered by an annoyed Chara

Basically, you annoy Chara by talking about how single you are, so she smothers your face in her chest till you shut up about it.

This image was taken from the smash or pass in my Discord.

Be aware, I made Chara very tall so you can properly be smothered, 6'6.
creator: Charawithatophat
